title: Create & Explore: Vanilla+
description: A small Fabric modpack focused mainly on Vanilla with some added QOL, Exploration and Create
body:
## Create & Explore: Vanilla+

A small scale Vanilla focussed modpack with some added QOL, Exploration and Create
Perfect for small servers with friends.

Enjoy the Vanilla feel with untouched biomes and major mechanics, explore to find overhauled structures or settle and create amazing bases with a massive amount of block variants.


### Some of the mods included
- Create + (Copycats+ and Steam 'n Rails)
- Chisel & Chipped
- The entire YUNG's Library of structure replacements and additions
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Villages
- and Many more!
